tasks.subject: Task 0: Vendor gdproto/options.proto + Go stubs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship proto/gdproto/options.proto, committed Go stubs at internal/gdprotopb/, and a //go:embed accessor. Add `task gen-options` to Taskfile.

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/gdprotopb/...` PASS; `task gen-options && git diff --quiet internal/gdprotopb/` exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files":["proto/gdproto/options.proto","internal/gdprotopb/options.pb.go","internal/gdprotopb/embed.go","internal/gdprotopb/embed_test.go","Taskfile.yml"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/gdprotopb/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["options.proto defines class_prefix at field 51000","gdprotopb.Bytes() returns embedded proto source","task gen-options is idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Plumb class_prefix through parser and descriptor paths
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ast.ProtoFile.Options["(gdproto.class_prefix)"] is populated by both parser path and descriptor path.

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/parser/... ./internal/descriptors/... -v` PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/descriptors/converter.go","internal/descriptors/converter_test.go","internal/parser/parser_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/parser/... ./internal/descriptors/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["parser populates Options key","descriptor path reads gdprotopb.E_ClassPrefix extension"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Prefix and name resolvers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure helpers ResolvePrefix(file) and NewNameResolver(files).Lookup(fqn).

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/generator/ -run Prefix -v` PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/generator/names.go","internal/generator/names_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/generator/ -run Prefix -v","acceptanceCriteria":["filename PascalCase derivation","option override with identifier validation","resolver covers nested messages and top-level enums"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Rewrite generator.Generate for multi-file output
tasks.description:
**Goal:** generator.Generate returns []GeneratedFile; one file per message/top-level enum; cross-refs use NameResolver. Update goldens to examples/golden/.

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/generator/... -v` PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/generator/","examples/golden/"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/generator/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Generate returns []GeneratedFile","one file per message/top-level enum","nested enums stay inline","cross-message refs use NameResolver","goldens match output byte-for-byte"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: CLI -o directory semantics + --print-options-proto
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `gdproto -o <dir>` writes per-class files into the directory; `--print-options-proto` writes embedded proto to stdout.

**Verify:** `go test ./internal/cli/... -v` PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["internal/cli/root.go","internal/cli/root_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./internal/cli/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["-o accepts directory; rejects .gd file paths","wrote N files to <dir>/ message","--print-options-proto byte-equal exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: protoc plugin emits multiple files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** protoc-gen-gdscript emits one CodeGeneratorResponse_File per GeneratedFile plus proto_core_utils.gd; duplicate-filename guard; --print-options-proto.

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/protoc-gen-gdscript/... -v` PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/protoc-gen-gdscript/main.go","cmd/protoc-gen-gdscript/main_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/protoc-gen-gdscript/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["one File per GeneratedFile","duplicate filename errors with class_prefix hint","--print-options-proto supported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Integration tests for CLI / protoc / buf install paths
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end tests prove README install paths work; CI installs protoc + buf.

**Verify:** `go test -tags=integration ./tests/integration/... -v` PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["tests/integration/",".github/workflows/"],"verifyCommand":"go test -tags=integration ./tests/integration/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["CLI scenario produces GameHero.pb.gd","protoc scenario produces GameHero.pb.gd","buf scenario produces GameHero.pb.gd","--print-options-proto byte-equal","CI installs protoc + buf"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Update Vest/Godot runtime harness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vest suite round-trips wire bytes through per-class files; add multi-proto cross-file test.

**Verify:** Vest target (e.g. `task test:godot`) PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["tests/"],"verifyCommand":"task test:godot","acceptanceCriteria":["existing Vest tests pass","multi-proto cross-file test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: README and Docusaurus docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README + website docs explain new directory output, class_prefix option, mandatory import for protoc/buf, three install snippets, breaking-change callout.

**Verify:** Task 6 integration tests pass against README snippets.

```json:metadata
{"files":["README.md","website/"],"verifyCommand":"go test -tags=integration ./tests/integration/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Quick Usage shows -o <dir>","Custom prefix section with required import","breaking-change callout","Docusaurus updated"]}
```
